title: Super Miner Bros!
description: Super Miner Bros or more simply as SMB, is an RP(Resource Pack(Texture Pack)) x Minecraft!
body:
Is here! the first texture pack for minecraft inspired by the world of Super Mario bros with PBR For Minecraft!

CTM, Custom Blocks, Custom Entities, Custom Sound Effects, Shaders Support, Custom Animations and more!

More information on our [Website!](https://superminerbros.my.canva.site/)

Do you want to be up to date with news? you can follow us on [X](https://x.com/SuperMinerBros_)

Our official[Discord](https://discord.gg/te57qcapqk)community!
